title: nepeta cyrenaica
intro: Nepeta cyrenaica, also known as Libyan catmint or Cyrenaican catmint, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Nepeta cyrenaica include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues. Nepeta cyrenaica can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
